cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when David could have gone to the football field. The question says he went there today, and we need to find out between which times he could have gone. There are several witnesses who saw David doing different things at specific times. The football field was closed after 10pm, so we know he had to go there before that. First, let me list out all the times David was seen doing other activities: 1. David woke up at 5am. 2. Steven saw David buying a phone from 5am to 6am. 3. Kimberly saw David at the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 6am to 8am. 4. Betty saw David working out at the gym from 9am to 12pm. 5. Lisa saw David driving to the water park from 12pm to 3pm. 6. William saw David on a rooftop from 3pm to 10pm. So, the key here is to find the time when David wasn't occupied with these activities. Since he can't be in two places at once, the time he went to the football field must be when none of these witnesses saw him. Let me break down the timeline: - 5am: David wakes up. - 5am to 6am: Buying a phone with Steven. So he's busy here. - 6am to 8am: At the Leaning Tower of Pisa with Kimberly. Busy again. - 8am to 9am: What's happening here? After Kimberly's sighting ends at 8am and before Betty's gym session starts at 9am, there's a one-hour gap. So maybe David could have gone to the football field here. - 9am to 12pm: Working out at the gym. Busy. - 12pm to 3pm: Driving to the water park. Busy. - 3pm to 10pm: On the rooftop with William. Busy. - After 10pm: Football field closed. So, the only time when David isn't seen doing anything is between 8am and 9am. That's when he could have gone to the football field.
